title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
